headline: Nasdaq Futures Plunge as Broadcom Sinks on Disappointing AI Chip Sales Forecast
summary: June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are trending down -1.12% this morning as a disappointing forecast from Broadcom led investors to hit pause on the AI trade.
